calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Appellant/Defendant Platinum Hills Inc., dba 1 Unique Autobody et al by manager, Bolden Liu and mechanic Danny Chan.
Ronald P. St.Clair, Esq., for Respondent/Plaintiff, Marina Gouchanskaia-Quezada, who is also present.

Danny Chan & Bolden Liu testify on behalf of Platinum Hills Inc. Plaintiff submits documentary evidence identified as Exhibit 1- service invoice.

Ronald P. St. Clair testifies on behalf of Marina Gouchanskaia-Quezada. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - contract
Exhibit B - invoice from 1 Unique Automotive
Exhibit C - invoice from The Garage
Exhibit D - preliminary estimate from 19th Auto Body Center
Exhibit E - invoice from Botta's Auto Body

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Debrenia Madison, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
